FreeTheAI vs NVIDIA NIM

Compare FreeTheAI and NVIDIA NIM: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

FreeTheAI
NVIDIA NIM
Category
AI Large Models

⭐ 5

unlimited

Pay-as-you-go

FreeTheAI

Free AI API gateway with 50+ models. One Discord account gets a key for GPT-5, Claude 4.5, DeepSeek R1, Gemini 3.0, Grok 4 and more. OpenAI compatible, no credit card, 30 req/min rate limit, no daily cap.

Pros

  • ✓50+ models with one key
  • ✓No credit card, no billing, no daily cap
  • ✓100% OpenAI compatible
  • ✓Full GPT/Claude/DeepSeek/Gemini/Grok coverage
  • ✓API works from China (Discord signup needs VPN)
  • ✓Key is permanent

Cons

  • ✗Discord signup needs VPN
  • ✗30 req/min rate limit, not for high concurrency
  • ✗Free public service, no SLA
  • ✗Not suitable for production
  • ✗Model names need bbl/ prefix

Key Features

50+ models unified accessGPT-5/Claude 4.5 flagship modelsOpenAI compatible APIDiscord /signup for keyChat/image/video/TTS supportAPI accessible from China
View Details →

NVIDIA NIM

NVIDIA's cloud inference platform, free for developers. Supports 121 models including DeepSeek V4, Llama, Qwen, and more. The largest model selection among free platforms, ideal for developers who need to compare multiple models.

Pros

  • ✓Largest model selection (121 models)
  • ✓Includes top models like DeepSeek V4 Pro
  • ✓NVIDIA GPU inference with quality guarantee
  • ✓Free developer program, no credit card required

Cons

  • ✗Requires VPN from China
  • ✗Some models have slow response times
  • ✗Free tier documentation is unclear

Key Features

121 ModelsDeepSeek V4 SeriesOpenAI-Compatible APINVIDIA GPU InferenceMultimodal Model Support
View Details →
